purpose: A standard item in a List with title, description, info, and optional icon. Most common list item type.
whenToUse: As child of List for simple items
whenNotToUse: For tabular data — use ColumnListItem in a Table
doRules: Use Navigation type when item leads to detail
Pair title with optional description and icon
Use info property for trailing status/value
Keep title short — truncate with ellipsis if long
dontRules: Do not put complex layouts inside StandardListItem — use CustomListItem
Do not omit type when item is interactive
Do not stack multiple long lines

layoutGuidance.alignment: Icon left, title+description center-left, info right.

exceptions: When icon is large product image, use ProductListItem instead
